mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplyTaskDao.select */ select apply_id , task_nm_ko , task_nm_en , apply_realm_id , rspnber_nm , enc_brthdy , enc_mbtlnum , enc_email , dept_nm , ofcps_nm , adres , enc_telno , enc_fxnum , sctecrno , hope_dty_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@HOPE_CODE_GROUP}', hope_dty_cd) as hope_dty , now_adres , recent_send_date , task_type_cd , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task where apply_id = #{applyId}
